retrieved_result: Bunyip or Yowie? The hunt is on in Richmond Vale Bunyip or Yowie? The hunt is on in Richmond Vale Here's a bit of school holiday fun... Richmond Vale Railway Museum volunteers continue to report strange sounds and the feeling of being watched. One or two volunteers have even suggested that there is a bunyip or a yowie living near the drainage pond
